commit_scope: Prove Form-native mutation response projection from live application graph rows before any public mutation flip.

commands: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_application_graph_response_projection.py tests/test_application_graph_live_db_trial.py tests/test_application_graph_node_port_form.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py

cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_application_graph_response_projection.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py

python3 scripts/validate_spec_quality.py --file specs/native-mutation-response-projection.md --file specs/native-graph-mutation-live-db-proof.md --file specs/native-mutation-ab-observation-gate.md --file specs/method-specific-native-mutation-preview-bindings.md --file specs/ideas-router-form-expression.md --file specs/spec-registry-source-native.md --file specs/graph-node-form-port.md --file specs/application-graph-node-sql-carrier.md --file specs/native-auth-parity-carrier.md --file specs/graph-node-mutation-native-carrier.md
local_validation.summary: application-graph-response-projection.fk projects graph row values into IdeaWithScore and SpecRegistryEntry-shaped JSON without FastAPI service calls. The sibling-kernel band returned 111 across Go/Rust/TypeScript. application-graph-response-projection-test.sh self-provisioned a throwaway Postgres and returned verdict 111111 after Form-native graph writes, SQL readback, idea projection, spec projection, cleanup, and close.

known_limitations.observed: No ordinary public POST/PATCH/DELETE traffic moved. The response projection proof runs in Form tests and a throwaway database only.
Cache invalidation, parent/edge repair beyond deleted-node edge cleanup, resonance re-attunement, and contributor-key audit updates remain follow-up proof.
The preview response now reports side-effect and reversible-gate blockers; it still returns executes:false and requires X-Form-Native-Preview.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push of the native mutation response projection commit and GitHub checks on PR #2586.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted. This slice intentionally avoids the production application database and keeps the public front-door flip blocked.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form-native mutation responses can now be projected from live application graph rows into IdeaWithScore and SpecRegistryEntry-shaped responses. The public route still fans out to FastAPI by default.
test_flows: form/scripts/application-graph-response-projection-test.sh -> verdict: 111111 and application graph response projection PASS
agn-create-node -> graph_nodes rows read through pg_query and projected by agrp-project-idea-row / agrp-project-spec-row
IdeaWithScore projection computes free_energy_score, marginal_cc_score, remaining_cost_cc, value_gap_cc, roi_cc, cost_vector, and value_vector
SpecRegistryEntry projection computes value_gap, cost_gap, estimated_roi, actual_roi, contributor ids, source path, hash, and workspace id

cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_application_graph_response_projection.py tests/test_application_graph_live_db_trial.py tests/test_application_graph_node_port_form.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py -> 31 passed

phase_gate.reason: Response projection parity is complete for live mutation rows; public mutable front-door execution still needs cache/side-effect proof, contributor-key audit proof, and a reversible public flip gate.
